name: Autophagy Induction Coverage Repair for June 11, 2026
summary: Coverage-repair bundle staging active, completed, and stale no-results Autophagy Induction registry context plus a direct 2026 polyamine/autophagy review boundary. The proposed outlook refresh keeps the track at low-confidence human_biomarker_signal with mixed momentum.

scope.question: Which source-completeness gaps for Autophagy Induction need repair before ordinary surveillance resumes, and do active/no-results registries or recent reviews change the public read?

proposed_changes.summary: Add the completed KH-1 autophagy prediabetes registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The June 11 assessment identified this as the most direct missing completed no-results autophagy-induction registry.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the KH-1 completed no-results study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent actual completion, endpoint scope, and no-results status without creating an efficacy claim.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the KH-1 completed no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make the completed direct autophagy registry visible as source-completeness and watchlist context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the recruiting spermidine MCI sleep autophagy registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair active spermidine/autophagy registry coverage for a trial with polyamine and eIF5A hypusination endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the spermidine MCI sleep autophagy registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent the recruiting disease-context trial while keeping it separate from general healthy-aging evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the spermidine MCI recruiting no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Keep the active autophagy-marker trial in the public watch map without upgrading stage.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the active spermidine elderly CAD registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair active registry coverage for the larger older-patient spermidine trial with autophagy, polyamine, muscle, cognition, cardiometabolic, and cardiovascular endpoints.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the spermidine elderly CAD phase 2 registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Capture status, sample size, broad endpoint scope, autophagy-marker endpoints, and no-results status.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the spermidine elderly CAD active no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make the large older-patient spermidine registry visible while preserving disease-context and attribution caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the stale FMD immunosenescence elderly registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair stale unknown-status registry coverage at the FMD, immune-response, and frailty boundary.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the FMD immunosenescence prefrail elderly registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent the stale no-results FMD trial without collapsing FMD immune/frailty outcomes into autophagy-specific efficacy.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the FMD stale unknown-status no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make the stale registry status explicit as an operational watch item and taxonomy boundary.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the recruiting trehalose T2D microvascular autophagy registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair mechanistic autophagic-flux registry coverage while keeping diabetes microvascular context separate from broad aging evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the trehalose T2D microvascular autophagy registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent the short mechanistic trial and autophagic-flux endpoint without overstating healthy-aging relevance.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the trehalose recruiting no-results finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Expose the direct autophagic-flux watch item and its short, disease-context limitations.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the 2026 polyamine/autophagy muscle-aging review source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair direct review-triangulation coverage for spermidine/polyamine autophagy and muscle-aging mechanism.
Represent the review as mechanism and taxonomy context rather than result-bearing human efficacy evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the polyamine/autophagy review boundary finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Use the review to clarify mechanism and taxonomy without upgrading the public stage.

proposed_changes.summary: Refresh the Autophagy Induction outlook support map with registry watch and review-boundary context.
proposed_changes.rationale: The public outlook should expose the repaired registry landscape and taxonomy boundary while keeping evidence stage, momentum, and confidence conservative.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Add no-results registry watch context and a direct polyamine/autophagy review boundary while preserving human_biomarker_signal, mixed momentum, and low confidence because the repair does not add durable human functional benefit.

next_actions: Run source-fidelity, interpretation, taxonomy, and safety review before publishing the staged coverage-repair bundle.
If approved, publish the staged records and return Autophagy Induction to ordinary surveillance with watch items for posted registry results and status changes.
